description: 'metal ewer' is used in scene 5 without prior introduction (pours cold water over Hadji Murad's hands)
'folded letter' is transferred in scene 6 without prior introduction (Bata's letter, taken by Panov to send up the chain)
'rifle' is used in scene 6 without prior introduction (drops rifle butt to the ground while crouching by the fire)
'pistol' is used in scene 8 without prior introduction (hand finds it instinctively upon waking)
'bridle' is used in scene 10 without prior introduction (dropped, then taken up again as he resumes riding)
'burka' is used in scene 11 without prior introduction (spread on the ground for prayer, earth shaken from it afterward)
'kinzhal' is used in scene 14 without prior introduction (Boy reaches for it; Hadji Murad lets him touch hilt)
'gold repeater watch' is transferred in scene 15 without prior introduction (Given to Hadji Murad, examined, handed back)
'sealed dispatch' is transferred in scene 18 without prior introduction (Delivered by courier, announces Hadji Murad's defection)
'dagger' is used in scene 25 without prior introduction (Hand rests on hilt, not drawn)
'dispatch/folder' is used in scene 27 without prior introduction (Opens the folder for Nicholas's review)
'seal' is used in scene 32 without prior introduction (Pressed onto the proclamation after Shamil's nod)
'Gurda sword' is transferred in scene 34 without prior introduction (Given by Hadji Murad as a parting gift)
'gold coins' is transferred in scene 36 without prior introduction (Seven piles of ten swept into his sleeve)
'silver coin (Yusuf's token)' is used in scene 37 without prior introduction (On leather thong at throat, closed in his hand)
'powder flask' is used in scene 43 without prior introduction (Last flask set within reach at the bank wall)
'cloth bundle (severed head)' is transferred in scene 44 without prior introduction (Delivered by kneeling courier onto the carpet)
